---
name: build-feature
agent: "agent"
---

Build the feature according to the approved specification and implementation plan. Create or modify code, tests, documentation, and any other necessary artifacts to complete the feature as defined in `specs/features/{{feature-name}}/spec.md` and `specs/features/{{feature-name}}/plan.md`. Follow best practices for code quality, maintainability, and collaboration, and ensure all tasks meet their defined **Done When** criteria.
